# Innodify — Digital Solutions Agency

> Innodify is a digital solutions agency based in Surat, Gujarat, India. We specialize in AI solutions, CRM development, SaaS products, web development, eCommerce, and mobile app development.

## Company Information
- **Name:** Innodify
- **Website:** https://innodify.in
- **Location:** 6th Floor, 602 Sundram Plus, Timaliyawad, Athugar St, Nanpura, Surat, Gujarat 395001, India
- **Phone:** +91 79843 71199
- **Email:** support@innodify.co.in
- **Founded:** Surat, India

## Services
- AI Solutions: Agentic AI, AI chatbots, custom AI models, process automation, predictive analytics
- CRM Development: Custom CRM solutions for sales, marketing, and customer management
- SaaS Products: End-to-end SaaS product development and scaling
- Web Development: Full-stack web application development
- eCommerce: Shopify, Magento, headless commerce, custom eCommerce solutions
- Mobile Apps: iOS and Android mobile application development

## Industries Served
Healthcare, Fintech, eCommerce, Education, Real Estate, Logistics, Sports & Gaming, Media & Entertainment
